steps.name: Phase 0: Identifying Contracts to Cover
steps.description: Identify all contracts in the current repository that must always be fully covered by the fuzzer
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-0.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-0 agent to identify all contracts that must be covered.

steps.name: Phase 1: Identifying Touched Functions
steps.description: Identify all contracts that are touched by the contracts targeted in the system that we care about
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-1.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-1 agent to identify all touched contracts that we care about.

steps.name: Phase 2: Identifying Meaningful Values
steps.description: Identify values that are useful for clamping target function handlers with
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-2.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-2 agent to identify values useful for clamping.

steps.name: Phase 3: Creating Clamped Handlers
steps.description: Implement clamped function handlers to achieve full coverage on the system setup
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-3.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-3 agent to implement clamped handlers

steps.name: Phase 4: Creating Shortcut Handlers
steps.description: Implement shortcut handlers that allow the fuzzer to reach coverage faster.
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-4.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-4 agent to implement shortcut functions

steps.name: Phase 5: Initial Coverage With Fuzzer
steps.description: Run Echidna and establish a base level of coverage
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-5.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-5 agent to establish a baseline level of fuzzer coverage

steps.name: Phase 6: Evaluate Coverage
steps.description: Evaluate the coverage report from the latest run of Echidna
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-6.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-6 agent to evaluate the coverage report from the latest run of Echidna

steps.name: Coverage Completion Check
steps.description: Check if coverage is complete or needs another iteration

decision.NOTE: Coverage incomplete, call Phase 3 agent outlined at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-3.md to fix the clamped handler implementations or add additional clamped handlers to achieve coverage over functions that aren't currently covered in functions-missing-covg.json
